headline: ROTATION CONFIRMATION (first agent assessment). Live composite 77.9 (Established). Note: scanner rotation_state listed 74.9; using live data per assessor protocol — DATA INTEGRITY FLAG. Belgium is a stable democracy with broadly respected political rights and civil liberties (Freedom House 2025/2026); guarantees freedom of assembly, association, speech, press. Concerns: 2023 House Justice Committee 'rioter' law reform (potential right-of-assembly infringement); historical rising xenophobia; corruption scandals. Strong human rights diplomacy posture (FPS Foreign Affairs). No 5pt-threshold-crossing in-window event identified. Composite 77.9 holds.
data_integrity_flag: Scanner rotation_state listed Belgium at 74.9; live data is 77.9. Used live per assessor protocol.

evidence.finding: Stable functioning democracy; broadly respected political rights and civil liberties; freedoms of assembly, association, speech, press guaranteed.
Active human rights diplomacy posture in international policy.

evidence.source: Belgium National Action Plan on Business and Human Rights
evidence.finding: Maintains National Action Plan on Business and Human Rights; institutional ACC/INT signal.

negativeSignals: 2023 'rioter' law reform (assembly-right concern); historical xenophobia trends; corruption scandals.
positiveSignals: Stable democracy; strong constitutional protections; active human rights diplomacy.
